shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'src/date_utils.ts' -g 'src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts'"

/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"react-datepicker parseDate strictParsing native Date fallback dateFormat\" --json --top-k 5
sed -n '1,220p' AGENTS.md
rg -n \"function parseDate|parseDate\\(|strictParsing|new Date\" src/date_utils.ts src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '250,335p' src/date_utils.ts
sed -n '970,1130p' src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts
rg -n \"parseDate\" src | head -40
git diff -- src/date_utils.ts src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts --runInBand --silent 2>&1 | tail -25
node_modules/.bin/ts-node -e \"import { parseDate } from './src/date_utils'; const cases = [ ['2025-12-16','MM/dd/yyyy',false], ['2025-12-16','MM/dd/yyyy',true], ['01/06/2019',['MM/dd/yyyy','dd/MM/yyyy'],false], ['26. feb 1995','d. MMM yyyy',false] ] as const; for (const [value, format, strict] of cases) { const d = parseDate(value, format as any, undefined, strict); console.log(value, strict, d?.toISOString() ?? null); }\""
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts --runInBand && git diff --check && git diff -- src/date_utils.ts src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts'

/bin/bash -lc 'mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals
git status --short
git diff --stat'
